name: Tecton
description: Tecton — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in Feature Platform.

seo.title: Tecton Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Tecton analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: Tecton is a AI API / SDK for Developers tool.
pros: Easy AI integration via REST API or SDK
cons: Token costs are unpredictable at scale
review.not_for: Apps with no AI or ML requirements

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales — no explicit peak-lock evidence

lock_in.reason: Feature store deeply integrated in ML pipelines
